questions.question: Describe the two types of image degradation models, namely, Point Spread Function (PSF) model and Single Image Noise Model (SIN), and explain the advantages of each. (10 marks)

A low-pass filter is used to remove high-frequency noise from an image. What is the effect of this filter on the frequency response of the image? Provide a mathematical representation of this effect. (5 marks)

Explain the concept of a prior model in image restoration. How does it affect the restoration process, and what are the advantages of using a prior model? Provide an example of a prior model and its application in image restoration. (10 marks)
